content.en:
"For a truly strong person, ten million primary-grade eternal ancient gold is indeed not much. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, the resources he spent now were unimaginable in the ordinary Bone Transformation Realm, and he couldn't even take out so many resources in the Seven Bone Transformation Realms.

Those powerhouses who were able to break through to the seventh bone transformation realm all relied on long years, accumulating wealth little by little to improve their strength, and the time spent was in millions of primeval eras.

And Ye Tian was able to raise his cultivation to this level in a short period of time, and the value of the resources spent was naturally terrifying.

"I don't have 10 million primary eternal ancient gold on me now, so I have to sell some resource treasures. "

Ye Tian then collected some resources that could not be used over the years, such as the resources obtained from the Eternal Giant Ape Clan.

He sold these resources in the Eternal Ancient Demon City in exchange for some primary Eternal Ancient Gold.

In a short period of time, he had gathered tens of millions of primary-grade eternal ancient gold.

But this Eternal Gold is definitely not enough, and if you see something good at auction, you can't afford it!

After all, the auction does not accept barter, and can only be purchased with eternal gold.

"The value of general resources is not high, and only the resources on the other side of the bank, Jinshui and Canghe Pearl, are of high value!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he sold some of his remaining gold water from the other side, and frantically grabbed resources from one Eternal True Beast Race after another.

For example, the Eternal Blood Bird clan was robbed by him one after another.

He sold all the looted resources in exchange for the first grade eternal gold.

Gradually, the amount of his eternal ancient gold reached more than 100 million.

100 million primary eternal ancient gold seems to be a lot, but in fact, when converted into medium eternal ancient gold, it is only 100,000 medium eternal ancient gold.

A piece of medium eternal gold is equivalent to a thousand primary eternal gold, but the value of a fine eternal gold is even more terrifying.

The value of a piece of high-grade eternal gold is equivalent to 100,000 medium-grade eternal gold, because the value of high-grade eternal ancient gold is too terrifying, and no force is willing to sell it.

Therefore, his current Eternal Ancient Gold is equivalent to a piece of Superior Eternal Ancient Gold.

"It's a pity that my copying talent can't synthesize the primary eternal ancient finance into the medium eternal ancient gold!"

He had tried fusion, but the grade of copying talent was not enough.

Strictly speaking, he could only fuse the treasures of the Blood Transformation Realm, and the treasures of the Bone Transformation Realm were too high to be fused and upgraded.

Otherwise, he would have fused pieces of Eternal Ancient Gold into a high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, and his wealth would be extremely terrifying.

Unfortunately, he couldn't do that.

......

this day.

The auction of the Eternal Ancient Demon City is about to begin.

At this time, many bone transformation realms came to the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

"Seven Bone Transformation Realms!"

"Eight Bone Transformation Realms!"

"Eight Bone Transformation Realms!"

Ye Tian had seen a lot of eight bone transformation realms, and even occasionally he could see the existence of a nine-stage bone transformation realm.

Obviously, this auction is very large.

And Ye Tian also came to the auction house for the first time-Eternal Night Auction Pavilion.

Eternal Night is the name of this top power, called Eternal Night Pavilion.

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Eternal Night Pavilion, and the Eternal Ancient Demon City didn't have much information about the Eternal Night Pavilion, he only knew that this force was terrifying, but how terrifying it was, the weak didn't know, and the strong wouldn't say it.

It can only be said that Ye Tian's current level is too low, and he can't contact a top force like the Eternal Night Pavilion, so he naturally doesn't know the strength of the other party.

It's like a very weak and weak blood transformation realm in the gap of the territorial sea boundary, and they only know that the human race is very strong, but how powerful it is, they don't know.

After entering the Eternal Night Auction Pavilion, a woman named Nine Blood Transformation Realm came to provoke the guests who came here.

These women come from one race to another, and for cultivators of different races, different women provoke them.

For example, Ye Tian came in and was entertained by a woman from the Nine Blood Transformation Realm who looked very similar to humans, and led him to the auction hall.

Of course.

Before the auction starts, he can enjoy a variety of delicacies and specially arranged consignments.

For example, if he wants to auction something, if it is approved, he can send it to auction.

If there is no consignment link, it is impossible for the Eternal Night Pavilion to take out the items for auction by itself!

"The Haven Inheritance on the other side should be able to sell a lot of Eternal Ancient Gold!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Besides, the place where the Haven inheritance on the other side is inherited may not have been discovered by other forces at the moment, but it will always be discovered.

When the time comes, maybe someone will get these Haven inheritances from the other side.

Therefore, he first sent the Haven on the other side to the auction to earn some eternal gold.

Before he came, he took the time to buy a batch of Beyond Shore Stones, which were inscribed with a thousand Beyond Haven.

This is just a part of the Haven on the Other Side, and he won't take out all of the Haven on the Other Side, otherwise the impact will be too great.

Soon.

Here, he met an eight-time bone transformation from the Eternal Night Pavilion.

"Infinity Lord!"

"Lord of Cangshan!"

Ye Tian and the Lord of Cangshan introduced each other.

The Lord of Cangshan said, "Lord of Endless, what do you want to send?"

"This!"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand and took out the dense stones on the other side, and each stone on the other side was inscribed with a black text on the other side.

"So many !! on the other side"

The Lord of Cangshan was shocked.

The condition for inscribed Beyond Haven is that you must thoroughly comprehend that Beyond Haven, and although the inscription can be preserved for a long time, it will still disappear after that, and it needs to be engraved again.

But even so, the inscription is of high value.

He didn't know if Ye Tian had really comprehended more than a thousand Haven on the other side by himself, or where he got it.

But it doesn't matter.

Auctioning off this set of Haven on the other side is good for the Eternal Night Pavilion, and that's enough.

As for other things, he won't ask more.

"Lord Cangshan, these Havens on the other side are qualified to enter the auction, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Naturally qualified!" The Lord of Cangshan hurriedly said: "These Havens on the other side are of high value, and there are so many of them, there will definitely be many strong bidders." However, after all, it is an inscription on the other side, so the value will not be ridiculously high, probably around the price of hundreds of thousands of medium eternal ancient gold. "

Ye Tian was surprised that there was such a high price.

He still underestimated the value of the Haven on the other side!

If the Black Mountain Inheritance Land is exposed, what a madness it will cause!
